title: Echo Harvest
pitch: Every run you fly is recorded and replays forever as a ghost that keeps harvesting for you.
howto: Fly short timed runs through the crystal field to harvest shards. Each finished run becomes a translucent echo that loops that exact route forever at reduced yield - even while you're away. Grind shards to upgrade speed, yield, echo efficiency and unlock richer field zones.
controls: Hold or drag anywhere - the harvester follows your pointer. Tap buttons to start runs and buy upgrades. WASD optional on desktop.
